VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Structures of Mental Spaces: How People Think About Space" by Barbara Tversky (2003) is a real, verifiable publication in *Environment and Behavior*, Vol. 35, pp. 66–80, with DOI 10.1177/0013916502238865. It is found on SAGE Journals and widely cited in academic literature with matching title, author, venue, and year.
